docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY LAI, MORGAN PATEL, NAMRATA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,505.00 FILED BY LAI, MORGAN AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, NAMRATA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00);DOCUMENT STAMPED 'BY FAX' SERVED SEP-13-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, NAMRATA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, MORGAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, NAMRATA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PATEL, NAMRATA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LAI, MORGAN $6,594.60 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,669.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,937.60 FILED BY PATEL, NAMRATA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAI, MORGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT MORGAN LAI APPEARED AND WAIVED SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT NAMRATA PATEL APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
